name: 오서진

appearance_en.face_shape: soft oval face, youthful rounded jaw, light cheekbones — slightly younger and softer than her sister, vulnerability more visible in the face structure
appearance_en.skin: fair Korean skin, smooth with slightly warm undertone, less makeup than her sister — a freshness that hasn't yet been fully covered by professional armor
appearance_en.eyes: double eyelid, dark brown iris, direct but with an involuntary softness she cannot quite control — a sharpness appears when she catches herself losing composure, subtle shadows under eyes from poor sleep
appearance_en.nose: neat straight nose, slightly small, soft rounded tip — matches the younger softness of her face
appearance_en.mouth: soft medium lips, naturally pink, resting expression slightly more open than her sister's — she has not yet learned to hold it perfectly still, lips tighten when suppressing emotion
appearance_en.eyebrows: naturally shaped moderately arched brows, less groomed than her sister's but naturally clean, knits together when anxious or overthinking
appearance_en.distinctive_marks: subtle dark circles from poor sleep, no moles or marks, faint flush appears at cheek when emotionally caught off guard
appearance_en.hair: dark brown hair, medium length just below shoulder, fine texture, worn loose or in a casual low braid — not styled for authority, styled for herself

body.proportions: slim frame, slightly less defined than her sister, shoulders a fraction narrower, overall lighter and less physically assertive presence
body.posture: upright but without her sister's deliberateness — natural standing posture occasionally shifts weight to one foot, arms sometimes crossed when uncertain
body.body_prompt: 164cm slim Korean woman, naturally upright posture without performed composure, slightly softer physical presence, arms occasionally crossed when uncertain

default.description: law firm business casual — simple fitted blazer or structured cardigan, tailored blouse, straight trousers or pencil skirt, flat shoes or low heel
default.wardrobe_prompt: simple structured blazer or fitted cardigan over tailored blouse, straight trousers or pencil skirt, flat shoes or low block heel, law firm business casual

casual.description: simple fitted cotton top or soft knit, straight jeans, sneakers or flats — younger and more relaxed than work
casual.wardrobe_prompt: simple fitted cotton top or soft knit sweater, straight-cut jeans, clean sneakers or ballet flats, minimal accessories

stressed.description: same casual clothes but arms wrapped or hugging herself, hair slightly messy, gaze avoidant
stressed.wardrobe_prompt: same casual cotton or knit clothes, arms crossing or self-hugging, hair slightly disheveled, withdrawn body posture

appearance_en.emotion_baseline: appears calm and logical on the surface, but the body gives her away before the face does — a slight hitch in breath, a fractional pause, a gaze held just too long
appearance_en.fal_identity_prompt: soft oval-faced Korean woman early 40s, direct dark eyes with involuntary warmth and subtle under-eye shadow, naturally arched brows, neat slightly small nose, soft medium lips, dark brown medium hair loose or low casual braid, 164cm slim lighter posture than a seasoned professional, fair warm-tone Korean skin, composed but emotionally legible

style_prompt: masako style illustration, clean delicate manga ink lines, warm-tone soft screen tone, muted warm palette with quiet tension, cinematic Korean drama composition, forbidden feeling rendered in stillness, subtle emotional conflict
negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3d render, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, western comic, overly cheerful, childish, chibi, idol look
